analysis_session.purpose: Identify design capabilities underrepresented in current Joju profile
analysis_session.user_concern: Joju not showing off all design capability

examples: Hammer Consulting: SaaS portal UX, report redesign, drag-and-drop features
Nike: Industrial design with user testing
8825: UX strategy for PCMS and Trustybits

industrial_design.note: Only 1 project showcased despite 20+ years in eyewear/product design

examples: PRTCL: Eyewear, apparel, sports, timepieces across multiple markets
Web crawlers, Secret Vault, learning mapper
Shot Tracker mentioned in portfolio (not in Joju)
PRTCL work implies branding but not explicit
Hammer: Figma and Adobe XD prototypes

in_library: PRTCL: 6 years (2018-2024) - Managing Partner & Design Lead
eyewear_design_depth.currently_shown: PRTCL mentioned with Shinola, but 16 years of eyewear design compressed into generic bullets
missing_specifics: Nike Vision product line ($10M revenue) - mentioned in Marchon but not detailed
VSP Innovation Lab founding - mentioned in about but not in work experience
eyewear_design_depth.impact: Your PRIMARY design discipline (eyewear) is barely visible despite 16+ years

watch_design.currently_shown: Fossil has generic bullets, Shinola watches mentioned but not detailed
missing_specifics: Skechers watch line launch (23.7% sales increase) - mentioned but not prominent
watch_design.impact: 7+ years of watch design experience minimized

sports_product_design.currently_shown: Nike goggles featured, Shinola bicycle mentioned, but sports design expertise not emphasized
sports_product_design.impact: Sports design niche not clearly established

in_library: Marchon: Founded 3D design department (VSP Innovation Lab)
3d_design_cad.currently_shown: Mentioned in Marchon bullet but not emphasized as capability

in_library: PRTCL: 'plethora of materials', 'enduring and beautiful materials'
material_expertise.currently_shown: Generic mentions, no specific material expertise showcased

manufacturing_production.currently_shown: Brief mentions, no emphasis on production expertise

visual_design_aesthetics.currently_shown: Mentioned but not showcased with specific examples

cross_industry_versatility.currently_shown: Roles listed but versatility not highlighted as strength

current_prioritization_logic.bias_identified: Current profile emphasizes BUSINESS OUTCOMES over DESIGN CRAFT
current_prioritization_logic.result: Reads more like Product Manager/Strategist than Designer/Design Leader

immediate_fixes.suggested: Product Designer / UX Leader / Industrial Designer

immediate_fixes.action: Enhance Marchon entry with VSP Innovation Lab details
immediate_fixes.add: Founded VSP Innovation Lab (3D design department), pioneering digital prototyping in eyewear industry, reducing prototyping timelines and enhancing iteration speed through CAD/3D modeling
immediate_fixes.impact: Shows technical design leadership and innovation

immediate_fixes.action: Add specific eyewear collections to PRTCL
immediate_fixes.add: Designed [X] eyewear collections for [brands], working across runway, sport, lifestyle, and luxury markets with expertise in acetate, metal, and titanium materials
immediate_fixes.impact: Makes eyewear design concrete and specific

immediate_fixes.action: Enhance Fossil entry with watch design specifics
immediate_fixes.add: Designed [X] watch collections, leading Skechers watch line launch achieving 23.7% sales increase, with expertise in movement integration, case design, and watch-specific materials

Designed [X] sunglass collections for fishing/water sports market, implementing user fit profiles that reduced product returns, with expertise in polarized lens technology and sport-specific ergonomics

structural_changes.rationale: Maintain business credibility while showcasing design expertise

content: Industrial Design: Eyewear, watches, sports equipment, accessories
3D Design & CAD: Rhino, SolidWorks, digital prototyping, 3D printing
Materials: Acetate, metal, titanium, silicone, neoprene, leather
Manufacturing: Production-ready specs, factory collaboration, quality control
Visual Design: CMF, trend forecasting, brand aesthetic development
UX Design: User research, prototyping, usability testing, Figma, Adobe XD

structural_changes.change: Add 'Selected Design Work' or 'Portfolio Highlights' section

content_additions.examples: If you have any design awards, patents, or industry recognition
Your specific design approach, frameworks, or methodologies

content_additions.tools: Rhino, SolidWorks, Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, KeyShot, etc.

prioritization_framework_needed.current_state: Ad-hoc selection based on what was mined
prioritization_framework_needed.problem: No systematic way to ensure design capabilities are represented
prioritization_framework_needed.goal: Ensure each dimension has at least 2-3 examples in profile
prioritization_framework_needed.implementation: Use Joju Curation Agent with 'design_showcase' target type

critical_gaps: Eyewear design depth (16 years compressed to generic bullets)
3D/CAD technical skills (VSP Innovation Lab not prominent)
gap_summary.perception_risk: Profile reads as Product Manager/Strategist, not Designer
gap_summary.recommended_action: Rebalance to 60/40 business outcomes vs design craft
